3165270.name: World War Armies - Japan Nation Unlock Pack
3165270.description:
Japan joins the WWA battlefield and gives you a chance to be among the first players to try it out! This DLC contains everything you need to have a competitive Japanese deck and start climbing the ranks in World War Armies!

This pack includes the following Japan units:


  • 1x Type 1 Ho-Ha "Winter" Skin
  • 1x Type 97 ShinHoTo Chi-Ha "Winter" Skin
  • 1x Type 95 Ha-Go "Winter" Skin
  • 1x Type 5 Ke-Ho "Winter" Skin
  • 1x Type 1 Chi-He "Winter" Skin
  • 1x Type 95 Ro-Go "Winter" Skin
  • 20x Infantry Recruit cards
  • 10x Type 10 Mortar cards
  • 3x Engineer Type 100 cards
  • 20x Type 95 Ha-Go cards
  • 5x Type 5 Ke-Ho cards
  • 3x Type 97 ShinHoTo Chi-Ha cards
  • 1x Type 1 Ho-Ha card
  • 10x Type 95 Ro-Go cards
  • 20x Type 1 Chi-He cards
  • 500 Tokens
  • 10000 Coins
3165270.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
